---
name: todo-app
description: A simple todo list manager for tracking tasks
version: 1.0.0
---

# Todo App

Manage your daily tasks from the command line.

## Usage

Add a task:

```bash
echo "Buy groceries" >> ~/.todos.txt
```

List tasks:

```bash
cat ~/.todos.txt
```

## Features

- Add, remove, and list tasks
- Simple text file storage
